name: X就是了
sentence_1: 别浪费时间了，有什么想法说就是了。
pinyin_1: bié làng fèi shí jiān le， yǒu shén me xiǎng fǎ shuō jiù shì le。
translation_1: Stop wasting time — just say whatever is on your mind.
pinyin_2: xià cì bié dā ying tā jiù shì le。
translation_2: Just don't agree to it next time.
sentence_3: 不想去就直接说不去就是了，不用想那么多。
pinyin_3: bù xiǎng qù jiù zhí jiē shuō bụ́ qù jiù shì le， bụ́ yòng xiǎng nà me duō。
translation_3: If you don't want to go, just say so directly — no need to overthink it.

name: 还X呢
sentence_1: 还国际公司呢，服务质量这么差。
pinyin_1: hái guó jì gōng sī ne， fú wù zhì liàng zhè me chà。
translation_1: Some international company this is — the service quality is so poor.
sentence_2: 还中文专业的呢，中文说得还不如我。
pinyin_2: hái zhōng wén zhuān yè de ne， zhōng wén shuō de hái bù rú wǒ。
translation_2: And they're supposedly a Chinese major — their Chinese is even worse than mine.
sentence_3: 还说自己会做饭呢，饭都做坏了。
pinyin_3: hái shuō zì jǐ huì zuò fàn ne， fàn dōu zuò huài le。
translation_3: Claimed they could cook — and then ruined the meal.

name: 你X你的吧
sentence_1: 我不饿，你吃你的吧，不用等我。
pinyin_1: wǒ bụ́ è， nǐ chī nǐ de ba， bụ́ yòng děng wǒ。
translation_1: I'm not hungry — go ahead and eat, no need to wait for me.
sentence_2: 没有什么重要的事，你忙你的吧。
pinyin_2: méi yǒu shén me zhòng yào de shì， nǐ máng nǐ de ba。
translation_2: There's nothing important — you just carry on with what you're doing.
sentence_3: 你看你的书吧，我自己出去走走。
pinyin_3: nǐ kàn nǐ de shū ba， wǒ zì jǐ chū qù zǒu zǒu。
translation_3: You go ahead and read your book — I'll go out for a walk on my own.

name: 让/叫你X你就X
sentence_1: 老师让你多练你就多练，肯定没坏处。
pinyin_1: lǎo shī ràng nǐ duō liàn nǐ jiù duō liàn， kěn dìng méi huài chu。
translation_1: If the teacher tells you to practice more, then just practice more — it can only do you good.
sentence_2: 叫你拿着你就拿着，不用跟我客气。
pinyin_2: jiào nǐ ná zhe nǐ jiù ná zhe， bụ́ yòng gēn wǒ kè qi。
translation_2: If I tell you to take it, just take it — no need to stand on ceremony.
sentence_3: 让你早点睡你就早点睡，对身体好。
pinyin_3: ràng nǐ zǎo diǎn shuì nǐ jiù zǎo diǎn shuì， duì shēn tǐ hǎo。
translation_3: If they're telling you to sleep early, just sleep early — it's good for your health.

name: 说什么/怎么（着）也得X
sentence_1: 他受伤了，我说什么也得去看看他。
pinyin_1: tā shòu shāng le， wǒ shuō shén me yě děi qù kàn kàn tā。
translation_1: He has been injured — I absolutely must go and see him, no matter what.
sentence_2: 快要迟到了，说什么也得走了。
pinyin_2: kuài yào chí dào le， shuō shén me yě děi zǒu le。
translation_2: We are about to be late — we really have to go now, no excuses.
sentence_3: 这么有用的技术，我怎么着也得学。
pinyin_3: zhè me yǒu yòng de jì shù， wǒ zěn me zhe yě děi xué。
translation_3: This technology is so useful; I absolutely must learn it.

name: X就X（点儿）吧
sentence_1: 买就买点儿吧，别买太多。
pinyin_1: mǎi jiù mǎi diǎn ér ba， bié mǎi tài duō。
translation_1: If you are buying, just buy a little — do not buy too much.
sentence_2: 慢就慢点儿吧，安全最重要。
pinyin_2: màn jiù màn diǎn ér ba， ān quán zuì zhòng yào。
translation_2: If it is slow, then let it be slow — safety is most important.
sentence_3: 远就远点儿吧，环境好就值得。
pinyin_3: yuǎn jiù yuǎn diǎn ér ba， huán jìng hǎo jiù zhí de。
translation_3: If it is a bit far, so be it — as long as the environment is nice, it is worth it.

name: X是X
sentence_1: 我们讨论是讨论了，可是大家各有各的想法。
pinyin_1: wǒ men tǎo lùn shì tǎo lùn le， kě shì dà jiā gè yǒu gè de xiǎng fǎ。
translation_1: We did discuss it, but everyone had their own different views.
sentence_2: 留学生活累是累，不过我们学到了很多知识。
pinyin_2: liú xué sheng huó lèi shì lèi， bụ́ guò wǒ men xué dào le hěn duō zhī shi。
translation_2: Life as a student abroad is tiring, sure, but we've learned a great deal.
sentence_3: 这个房间大是大，就是离地铁站太远了。
pinyin_3: zhè ge fáng jiān dà shì dà， jiù shì li dì tiě zhàn tài yuǎn le。
translation_3: This room is big, sure, but it's just too far from the subway station.

name: 形容词/心理动词+死了/厉害
sentence_1: 面试的时候，我心里紧张死了。
pinyin_1: miàn shì de shí hou， wǒ xīn li jǐn zhāng sǐ le。
translation_1: During the interview, I was terribly nervous inside.
sentence_2: 今天走了这么多路，我的脚疼死了。
pinyin_2: jīn tiān zǒu le zhè me duō lù， wǒ de jiǎo téng sǐ le。
translation_2: I've walked so much today — my feet are killing me.
sentence_3: 他头疼得厉害，早早就回家休息了。
pinyin_3: tā tóu téng de lì hai， zǎo zǎo jiù huí jiā xiū xi le。
translation_3: He had a terrible headache and went home early to rest.

name: 动词+得/不+了
pinyin_1: xíng li tài zhòng le， wǒ ná bù liǎo。
translation_1: The luggage is too heavy — I can't carry it.
sentence_2: 这么多东西，你自己拿得了吗？
pinyin_2: zhè me duō dōng xi， nǐ zì jǐ ná de liǎo ma？
translation_2: Can you carry all these things by yourself?
sentence_3: 他受伤了，这次旅游去不了了。
pinyin_3: tā shòu shāng le， zhè cì lǚ yóu qù bu liǎo le。
translation_3: He was injured and won't be able to go on this trip.

name: 难道……吗？
sentence_1: 作为学生，难道学习不是最重要的事情吗？
pinyin_1: zuò wéi xué sheng， nán dào xué xí bụ́ shì zuì zhòng yào de shì qing ma？
translation_1: As a student, isn't studying the most important thing?
sentence_2: 工作出了问题，你难道不应该负责吗？
pinyin_2: gōng zuò chū le wèn tí， nǐ nán dào bù yīng gāi fù zé ma？
translation_2: Something went wrong at work — surely you should take responsibility?
sentence_3: 都这么晚了，你难道不累吗？
pinyin_3: dōu zhè me wǎn le， nǐ nán dào bụ́ lèi ma？
translation_3: It's already so late — surely you're tired?

name: 由疑问代词构成的反问句
sentence_1: 这么有名的作家，谁不认识他？
pinyin_1: zhè me yǒu míng de zuò jiā， shuí bụ́ rèn shi tā？
translation_1: Such a famous author — who doesn't know him?
sentence_2: 他去哪儿从来不说，我怎么会知道呢？
pinyin_2: tā qù nǎ ér cóng lái bù shuō， wǒ zěn me huì zhī dào ne？
translation_2: He never says where he's going — how would I know?
sentence_3: 事情这么多，我哪儿有时间出去旅游啊？
pinyin_3: shì qing zhè me duō， wǒ nǎ ér yǒu shí jiān chū qù lǚ yóu a？
translation_3: I have so many things to deal with — where would I find the time to go traveling?

name: 主语+把+宾语+动词（+一/了）+动词
sentence_1: 你再把那件衣服洗一洗。
pinyin_1: nǐ zài bǎ nà jiàn yī fu xǐ yi xǐ。
translation_1: Give that piece of clothing another wash.
sentence_2: 你把窗户擦一擦，我把房间扫一扫。
pinyin_2: nǐ bǎ chuāng hu cā yi cā， wǒ bǎ fáng jiān sǎo yi sǎo。
translation_2: You give the windows a wipe, and I'll give the room a sweep.
sentence_3: 他把钱数了数，又取了一点儿出来。
pinyin_3: tā bǎ qián shǔ le shǔ， yòu qǔ le yị̀ diǎn ér chū lái。
translation_3: He counted the money and then took out a little more.

name: 主语+把+宾语+动词+了
pinyin_1: wǒ bǎ yín háng kǎ mì mǎ wàng le。
translation_1: I've forgotten my bank card PIN.
pinyin_2: tā bǎ xīn mǎi de shǒu jī diū le。
translation_2: He lost his newly bought phone.
sentence_3: 她把作业本落在家里了。
pinyin_3: tā bǎ zuò yè běn là zài jiā lǐ le。
translation_3: She left her homework notebook at home.

name: 主语+把+宾语+动词+动量补语/时量补语
sentence_1: 因为不收拾房间，妈妈把他批评了一顿。
pinyin_1: yīn wèi bù shōu shi fáng jiān， mā ma bǎ tā pī píng le yị́ dùn。
translation_1: Because he didn't tidy his room, Mom gave him a good scolding.
sentence_2: 同学们把课文读了两遍。
pinyin_2: tóng xué men bǎ kè wén dú le liǎng biàn。
translation_2: The students read the text twice.
sentence_3: 他把这个问题认真地考虑了好几天。
pinyin_3: tā bǎ zhè ge wèn tí rèn zhēn de kǎo lǜ le hǎo jǐ tiān。
translation_3: He thought carefully about this problem for several days.

name: 主语+把+宾语+状语+动词
pinyin_1: nǐ bié bǎ lā jī wǎng dì shàng rēng。
translation_1: Don't throw your trash on the ground.
sentence_2: 请大家把说明书认真读一读。
pinyin_2: qǐng dà jiā bǎ shuō míng shū rèn zhēn dú yi dú。
translation_2: Please everyone read the instructions carefully.
sentence_3: 老师把学生的名字一个一个地写在了黑板上。
pinyin_3: lǎo shī bǎ xué sheng de míng zi yị́ gè yị́ gè dì xiě zài le hēi bǎn shàng。
translation_3: The teacher wrote the students' names on the blackboard one by one.

name: 主语+叫/让+宾语+动词+其他成分
sentence_1: 我的自行车让朋友借去了。
pinyin_1: wǒ de zì xíng chē ràng péng you jiè qù le。
translation_1: My bicycle was borrowed by a friend.
sentence_2: 他的雨伞叫人拿走了，找不到了。
pinyin_2: tā de yǔ sǎn jiào rén ná zǒu le， zhǎo bu dào le。
translation_2: His umbrella was taken by someone and can't be found.
pinyin_3: nà běn shū ràng tā dài huí jiā le。
translation_3: That book was taken home by him.

name: 表爱憎义：主语+表扬/批评+宾语1+动词+宾语2
sentence_1: 老师表扬我取得了好成绩。
pinyin_1: lǎo shī biǎo yáng wǒ qǔ dé le hǎo chéng jì。
translation_1: The teacher praised me for getting good grades.
sentence_2: 警察表扬那个小伙子帮助了别人。
pinyin_2: jǐng chá biǎo yáng nà ge xiǎo huǒ zi bāng zhù le bié ren。
translation_2: The police commended the young man for helping others.
sentence_3: 妈妈总是批评我不收拾房间。
pinyin_3: mā ma zǒng shì pī píng wǒ bù shōu shi fáng jiān。
translation_3: Mom always criticizes me for not tidying my room.

name: 表称谓或认定义：主语+收/选+宾语1+做/当/为+宾语2
pinyin_1: tóng xué men xuǎn wǒ zuò xiǎo zǔ zhǎng。
translation_1: My classmates elected me as group leader.
pinyin_2: dà jiā xiǎng xuǎn tā dāng duì zhǎng。
translation_2: Everyone wants to elect him as team captain.
sentence_3: 张教授同意收我为学生。
pinyin_3: zhāng jiào shòu tóng yì shōu wǒ wéi xué sheng。
translation_3: Professor Zhang agreed to take me on as a student.

name: 表致使：主语+使/让+人称代词+动词短语
sentence_1: 这件事使我改变了对她的印象。
pinyin_1: zhè jiàn shì shǐ wǒ gǎi biàn le duì tā de yìn xiàng。
translation_1: This matter caused me to change my impression of her.
sentence_2: 那些美好的回忆让我永远难忘。
pinyin_2: nà xiē měi hǎo de huí yì ràng wǒ yǒng yuǎn nán wàng。
translation_2: Those wonderful memories are something I will never be able to forget.
sentence_3: 他的话让我感到很不高兴。
pinyin_3: tā de huà ràng wǒ gǎn dào hěn bù gāo xìng。
translation_3: His words made me feel very unhappy.

name: A不如B（+形容词）
sentence_1: 现在堵车，打车不如坐地铁快。
pinyin_1: xiàn zài dǔ chē， dǎ chē bù rú zuò dì tiě kuài。
translation_1: With all this traffic, taking a taxi isn't as fast as taking the subway.
sentence_2: 我觉得玩游戏不如看小说有意思。
pinyin_2: wǒ jué de wán yóu xì bù rú kàn xiǎo shuō yǒu yì si。
translation_2: I think playing games isn't as interesting as reading novels.
sentence_3: 自己做饭不如去餐厅吃方便。
pinyin_3: zì jǐ zuò fàn bù rú qù cān tīng chī fāng biàn。
translation_3: Cooking at home isn't as convenient as eating at a restaurant.

name: 跟……相比
sentence_1: 跟走路相比，骑车快多了。
pinyin_1: gēn zǒu lù xiāng bǐ， qí chē kuài duō le。
translation_1: Compared with walking, riding a bike is much faster.
sentence_2: 跟他相比，我的汉语差远了。
pinyin_2: gēn tā xiāng bǐ， wǒ de hàn yǔ chà yuǎn le。
translation_2: Compared with him, my Chinese is far worse.
sentence_3: 跟去年相比，今年的冬天暖和多了。
pinyin_3: gēn qù nián xiāng bǐ， jīn nián de dōng tiān nuǎn huo duō le。
translation_3: Compared with last year, this winter is much warmer.

name: 用双重否定表示强调
pinyin_1: méi yǒu xué sheng bù xǐ huan fàng jià。
translation_1: There is no student who doesn't like having a holiday.
sentence_2: 这么重要的内容老师不可能没讲过。
pinyin_2: zhè me zhòng yào de nèi róng lǎo shī bù kě néng méi jiǎng guò。
translation_2: There is no way the teacher hasn't covered such important content.
pinyin_3: méi yǒu rén bù xiǎng shēn tǐ jiàn kāng。
translation_3: There is no one who doesn't want to be healthy.

name: 不是……，而是……
sentence_1: 他不是不想帮忙，而是确实没时间。
pinyin_1: tā bụ́ shì bù xiǎng bāng máng， ér shì què shí méi shí jiān。
translation_1: It's not that he doesn't want to help — he genuinely doesn't have the time.
sentence_2: 我不是不爱喝咖啡，而是担心晚上睡不着。
pinyin_2: wǒ bụ́ shì bụ́ ài hē kā fēi， ér shì dān xīn wǎn shang shuì bu zháo。
translation_2: It's not that I don't like coffee — I'm just worried I won't be able to sleep at night.
sentence_3: 她不是生气，而是太累了。
pinyin_3: tā bụ́ shì shēng qì， ér shì tài lèi le。
translation_3: She isn't angry — she's just exhausted.

name: 既……，又/也……
sentence_1: 这个牌子的奶茶既好喝，又健康。
pinyin_1: zhè ge pái zi de nǎi chá jì hǎo hē， yòu jiàn kāng。
translation_1: This brand of milk tea is both delicious and healthy.
sentence_2: 骑车上学既省钱，又能锻炼身体。
pinyin_2: qí chē shàng xué jì shěng qián， yòu néng duàn liàn shēn tǐ。
translation_2: Riding a bike to school is both money-saving and good exercise.
sentence_3: 这家餐厅的菜既好吃，价格又不贵。
pinyin_3: zhè jiā cān tīng de cài jì hǎo chī， jià gé yòu bụ́ guì。
translation_3: The food at this restaurant is both tasty and reasonably priced.

name: 一方面……，另一方面……
sentence_1: 学语言一方面要多听，另一方面要多说。
pinyin_1: xué yǔ yán yị̀ fāng miàn yào duō tīng， lìng yị̀ fāng miàn yào duō shuō。
translation_1: Learning a language requires, on the one hand, lots of listening, and on the other hand, lots of speaking.
sentence_2: 做好工作一方面需要有能力，另一方面需要认真负责。
pinyin_2: zuò hǎo gōng zuò yị̀ fāng miàn xū yào yǒu néng lì， lìng yị̀ fāng miàn xū yào rèn zhēn fù zé。
translation_2: Doing a good job requires ability on one hand and being conscientious on the other.
sentence_3: 出行一方面要注意安全，另一方面也要照顾好自己的身体。
pinyin_3: chū xíng yị̀ fāng miàn yào zhù yì ān quán， lìng yị̀ fāng miàn yě yào zhào gù hǎo zì jǐ de shēn tǐ。
translation_3: When traveling, on the one hand you need to pay attention to safety, and on the other hand you should also take good care of your health.

name: 首先……，其次……
sentence_1: 选择职业，首先要了解自己，其次再考虑收入。
pinyin_1: xuǎn zé zhí yè， shǒu xiān yào liǎo jiě zì jǐ， qí cì zài kǎo lǜ shōu rù。
translation_1: When choosing a career, first understand yourself, then consider income.
sentence_2: 学好汉语首先要多说，其次要多写。
pinyin_2: xué hǎo hàn yǔ shǒu xiān yào duō shuō， qí cì yào duō xiě。
translation_2: To learn Chinese well, you must first speak more, and secondly write more.
sentence_3: 做好这件事，首先要有信心，其次要认真准备。
pinyin_3: zuò hǎo zhè jiàn shì， shǒu xiān yào yǒu xìn xīn， qí cì yào rèn zhēn zhǔn bèi。
translation_3: To do this well, you first need confidence, and secondly you need to prepare carefully.

name: 首先……，然后……
sentence_1: 首先把作业做完，然后再去玩儿。
pinyin_1: shǒu xiān bǎ zuò yè zuò wán， rán hòu zài qù wán ér。
translation_1: First finish your homework, then go play.
sentence_2: 校长首先表示欢迎，然后介绍了学校情况。
pinyin_2: xiào zhǎng shǒu xiān biǎo shì huān yíng， rán hòu jiè shào le xué xiào qíng kuàng。
translation_2: The principal first extended a welcome, then introduced the school's situation.
sentence_3: 考试前，首先把材料准备好，然后再认真复习。
pinyin_3: kǎo shì qián， shǒu xiān bǎ cái liào zhǔn bèi hǎo， rán hòu zài rèn zhēn fù xí。
translation_3: Before an exam, first get your materials ready, then review carefully.

name: ……，于是……
sentence_1: 他没赶上公交车，于是只好打车回家。
pinyin_1: tā méi gǎn shàng gōng jiāo chē， yú shì zhǐ hǎo dǎ chē huí jiā。
translation_1: He missed the bus, so he had no choice but to take a taxi home.
sentence_2: 他累了，于是坐下来休息。
pinyin_2: tā lèi le， yú shì zuò xià lai xiū xi。
translation_2: He was tired, so he sat down to rest.
sentence_3: 外面下起了雨，于是我们留在家里看电影。
pinyin_3: wài miàn xià qǐ le yǔ， yú shì wǒ men liú zài jiā lǐ kàn diàn yǐng。
translation_3: It started raining outside, and so we stayed home and watched a film.

name: ……,甚至……
sentence_1: 我经常去健身房，甚至还请了教练。
pinyin_1: wǒ jīng cháng qù jiàn shēn fáng， shèn zhì hái qǐng le jiào liàn。
translation_1: I go to the gym regularly — I even hired a trainer.
sentence_2: 他高兴极了，甚至跳了起来。
pinyin_2: tā gāo xìng jí le， shèn zhì tiào le qǐ lai。
translation_2: He was overjoyed — he even jumped up.
sentence_3: 他很忙，甚至没时间吃饭。
pinyin_3: tā hěn máng， shèn zhì méi shí jiān chī fàn。
translation_3: He is very busy — he doesn't even have time to eat.

name: 不仅/不光……，还/而且……
sentence_1: 他不仅学习好，而且很愿意帮助别人。
pinyin_1: tā bù jǐn xué xí hǎo， ér qiě hěn yuàn yì bāng zhù bié ren。
translation_1: He not only does well in school but is also very willing to help others.
sentence_2: 他不光会唱歌，还会弹钢琴。
pinyin_2: tā bù guāng huì chàng gē， hái huì tán gāng qín。
translation_2: He not only sings but also plays the piano.
sentence_3: 她不光懂三种语言，还会弹钢琴和画画。
pinyin_3: tā bù guāng dǒng sān zhǒng yǔ yán， hái huì tán gāng qín hé huà huà。
translation_3: She not only knows three languages but can also play piano and paint.

name: ……，并且……
sentence_1: 他考上了大学，并且拿到了奖学金。
pinyin_1: tā kǎo shàng le dà xué， bìng qiě ná dào le jiǎng xué jīn。
translation_1: He got into university and moreover received a scholarship.
sentence_2: 她找到了工作，并且很快就上班了。
pinyin_2: tā zhǎo dào le gōng zuò， bìng qiě hěn kuài jiù shàng bān le。
translation_2: She found a job and moreover quickly started working.
sentence_3: 这位老师讲课非常清楚，并且对学生很耐心。
pinyin_3: zhè wèi lǎo shī jiǎng kè fēi cháng qīng chu， bìng qiě duì xué sheng hěn nài xīn。
translation_3: This teacher explains things very clearly and furthermore is very patient with students.

name: 连……也/都……，……更……
sentence_1: 她连简单的打招呼都说不好，更难说整个对话了。
pinyin_1: tā lián jiǎn dān de dǎ zhāo hu dōu shuō bù hǎo， gèng nán shuō zhěng gè duì huà le。
translation_1: She can't even manage a simple greeting well, let alone an entire conversation.
sentence_2: 受伤以后，他连走路都困难，踢足球更不可能了。
pinyin_2: shòu shāng yǐ hòu， tā lián zǒu lù dōu kùn nan， tī zú qiú gèng bù kě néng le。
translation_2: After getting injured, even walking was difficult for him, let alone playing football.
sentence_3: 他连一百米都跑不了，参加比赛就更不用说了。
pinyin_3: tā lián yị̀ bǎi mǐ dōu pǎo bù liǎo， cān jiā bǐ sài jiù gèng bụ́ yòng shuō le。
translation_3: He can't even run 100 meters, let alone take part in a competition.

name: 不是……，就是……
sentence_1: 他下课后不是练球，就是去图书馆。
pinyin_1: tā xià kè hòu bụ́ shì liàn qiú， jiù shì qù tú shū guǎn。
translation_1: After class he either practices ball or goes to the library.
sentence_2: 周末他不是去游泳，就是在球场打篮球。
pinyin_2: zhōu mò tā bụ́ shì qù yóu yǒng， jiù shì zài qiú chǎng dǎ lán qiú。
translation_2: On weekends he is either swimming or playing basketball on the court.
sentence_3: 她不是在画画儿，就是在听音乐。
pinyin_3: tā bụ́ shì zài huà huà ér， jiù shì zài tīng yīn yuè。
translation_3: She is either drawing or listening to music.

name: 尽管……，但是/可是……
sentence_1: 尽管收入不高，但是我对这份工作很满意。
pinyin_1: jǐn guǎn shōu rù bù gāo， dàn shì wǒ duì zhè fèn gōng zuò hěn mǎn yì。
translation_1: Even though the pay isn't high, I am very satisfied with this job.
sentence_2: 尽管已经很晚了，可是她仍然在学习。
pinyin_2: jǐn guǎn yǐ jīng hěn wǎn le， kě shì tā réng rán zài xué xí。
translation_2: Even though it was already very late, she was still studying.
sentence_3: 尽管天气很冷，但是他每天坚持跑步。
pinyin_3: jǐn guǎn tiān qì hěn lěng， dàn shì tā měi tiān jiān chí pǎo bù。
translation_3: Even though the weather is very cold, he insists on running every day.

name: ……，然而……
pinyin_1: tā xiǎng qù， rán ér méi yǒu shí jiān。
translation_1: He wanted to go; however, he had no time.
sentence_2: 她以为能轻松通过考试，然而成绩却不太好。
pinyin_2: tā yǐ wéi néng qīng sōng tōng guò kǎo shì， rán ér chéng jì què bụ́ tài hǎo。
translation_2: She thought she would pass the exam easily; however, her results were not very good.
sentence_3: 大家都以为他会放弃，然而他坚持了下来。
pinyin_3: dà jiā dōu yǐ wéi tā huì fàng qì， rán ér tā jiān chí le xià lai。
translation_3: Everyone thought he would give up; however, he persevered.

name: ……，不过……
pinyin_1: wǒ xiǎng qù， bụ́ guò míng tiān yǒu shì。
translation_1: I'd like to go, but I have something on tomorrow.
sentence_2: 他只学了三个月中文，不过已经说得不错了。
pinyin_2: tā zhǐ xué le sān gè yuè zhōng wén， bụ́ guò yǐ jīng shuō de bụ́ cuò le。
translation_2: He has only been studying Chinese for three months, but he can already speak it quite well.
sentence_3: 这道菜味道不错，不过有点儿太咸了。
pinyin_3: zhè dào cài wèi dao bụ́ cuò， bụ́ guò yǒu diǎn ér tài xián le。
translation_3: This dish tastes good, but it's a little too salty.

name: ……X是X，就是/不过……
sentence_1: 这些衣服便宜是便宜，就是感觉质量不太好。
pinyin_1: zhè xiē yī fu pián yi shì pián yi， jiù shì gǎn jué zhì liàng bụ́ tài hǎo。
translation_1: These clothes are cheap, sure, but the quality doesn't feel very good.
sentence_2: 小张这个人聪明是聪明，不过有时候比较懒。
pinyin_2: xiǎo zhāng zhè ge rén cōng ming shì cōng ming， bụ́ guò yǒu shí hou bǐ jiào lǎn。
translation_2: Xiao Zhang is smart, no doubt about it, but he can be quite lazy sometimes.
sentence_3: 这个地方安静是安静，就是离市区太远了。
pinyin_3: zhè ge dì fāng ān jìng shì ān jìng， jiù shì li shì qū tài yuǎn le。
translation_3: This place is quiet, sure, but it's just too far from the urban area.

name: ……，否则……
pinyin_1: duō hē shuǐ， fǒu zé róng yì shēng bìng。
translation_1: Drink more water, otherwise you'll get sick easily.
sentence_2: 课后一定要经常复习，否则很快就会忘记。
pinyin_2: kè hòu yị́ dìng yào jīng cháng fù xí， fǒu zé hěn kuài jiù huì wàng jì。
translation_2: You must review regularly after class, otherwise you will forget quickly.
sentence_3: 出门要带好雨伞，否则下雨了会很麻烦。
pinyin_3: chū mén yào dài hǎo yǔ sǎn， fǒu zé xià yǔ le huì hěn má fan。
translation_3: Take an umbrella when you go out, otherwise it'll be very inconvenient if it rains.

name: 要是……，就……
sentence_1: 你要是想取得成功，就必须坚持到底。
pinyin_1: nǐ yào shi xiǎng qǔ dé chéng gōng， jiù bì xū jiān chí dào dǐ。
translation_1: If you want to succeed, you must persevere to the end.
sentence_2: 要是下雨，我们就在家里玩。
pinyin_2: yào shi xià yǔ， wǒ men jiù zài jiā lǐ wán。
translation_2: If it rains, we'll just play at home.
sentence_3: 要是你有时间，就来我家吃饭吧。
pinyin_3: yào shi nǐ yǒu shí jiān， jiù lái wǒ jiā chī fàn ba。
translation_3: If you have time, come to my place for dinner.

name: 要是……，（就）……，否则……
sentence_1: 要是迟到，就打个电话，否则老师会担心的。
pinyin_1: yào shi chí dào， jiù dǎ gè diàn huà， fǒu zé lǎo shī huì dān xīn de。
translation_1: If you're going to be late, call ahead, otherwise the teacher will worry.
sentence_2: 要是你不常穿，最好就不要买，否则买了也是浪费。
pinyin_2: yào shi nǐ bù cháng chuān， zuì hǎo jiù bụ́ yào mǎi， fǒu zé mǎi le yě shì làng fèi。
translation_2: If you don't wear it often, it's best not to buy it — otherwise buying it would just be a waste.
sentence_3: 要是太贵，就别买，否则会后悔的。
pinyin_3: yào shi tài guì， jiù bié mǎi， fǒu zé huì hòu huǐ de。
translation_3: If it's too expensive, don't buy it, otherwise you'll regret it.

name: 不管……，都/也……
sentence_1: 不管在什么地方，说话、办事都要有礼貌。
pinyin_1: bù guǎn zài shén me dì fāng， shuō huà、 bàn shì dōu yào yǒu lǐ mào。
translation_1: No matter where you are, you should always speak and act politely.
sentence_2: 不管别人怎么说，我也不会改变主意。
pinyin_2: bù guǎn bié ren zěn me shuō， wǒ yě bụ́ huì gǎi biàn zhǔ yi。
translation_2: No matter what others say, I will not change my mind.
sentence_3: 不管多忙，他每天都坚持锻炼半个小时。
pinyin_3: bù guǎn duō máng， tā měi tiān dōu jiān chí duàn liàn bàn gè xiǎo shí。
translation_3: No matter how busy he is, he insists on exercising for half an hour every day.

name: 无论……，都/也……
sentence_1: 无论在多么紧张的情况下，他都表现得非常冷静。
pinyin_1: wú lùn zài duō me jǐn zhāng de qíng kuàng xià， tā dōu biǎo xiàn de fēi cháng lěng jìng。
translation_1: No matter how stressful the situation, he always remains very calm.
sentence_2: 无论遇到多大的困难，我们也不应该随便放弃。
pinyin_2: wú lùn yù dào duō dà de kùn nan， wǒ men yě bù yīng gāi suí biàn fàng qì。
translation_2: No matter how great the difficulties we face, we should not give up easily.
sentence_3: 无论谁来，都要提前说一声。
pinyin_3: wú lùn shuí lai， dōu yào tí qián shuō yị̀ shēng。
translation_3: Regardless of who comes, they must let someone know in advance.

name: 既然……，就……
sentence_1: 既然你这么喜欢小孩儿，毕业以后就当老师吧。
pinyin_1: jì rán nǐ zhè me xǐ huan xiǎo hái ér， bì yè yǐ hòu jiù dāng lǎo shī ba。
translation_1: Since you like children so much, you should become a teacher after you graduate.
sentence_2: 既然来了，就进屋喝杯茶吧。
pinyin_2: jì rán lái le， jiù jìn wū hē bēi chá ba。
translation_2: Since you're here, come inside and have a cup of tea.
sentence_3: 既然决定了，就不要后悔。
pinyin_3: jì rán jué dìng le， jiù bụ́ yào hòu huǐ。
translation_3: Since you've made your decision, don't regret it.

name: （由于）……，因此……
sentence_1: 由于您没带护照，因此不能办理银行卡。
pinyin_1: yóu yú nín méi dài hù zhào， yīn cǐ bù néng bàn lǐ yín háng kǎ。
translation_1: Because you did not bring your passport, you cannot open a bank account.
sentence_2: 我对京剧很感兴趣，因此报名参加了这次活动。
pinyin_2: wǒ duì jīng jù hěn gǎn xìng qù， yīn cǐ bào míng cān jiā le zhè cì huó dòng。
translation_2: I am very interested in Peking opera, and therefore signed up for this event.
sentence_3: 由于昨晚下了大雪，因此今天的航班都取消了。
pinyin_3: yóu yú zuó wǎn xià le dà xuě， yīn cǐ jīn tiān de háng bān dōu qǔ xiāo le。
translation_3: Due to heavy snowfall last night, all of today's flights have been cancelled.

name: ……，好……
sentence_1: 我每天都给父母打电话，好让他们放心。
pinyin_1: wǒ měi tiān dōu gěi fù mǔ dǎ diàn huà， hǎo ràng tā men fàng xīn。
translation_1: I call my parents every day so that they can stop worrying.
sentence_2: 我们应该多鼓励他，好让他有信心。
pinyin_2: wǒ men yīng gāi duō gǔ lì tā， hǎo ràng tā yǒu xìn xīn。
translation_2: We should encourage him more so that he gains confidence.
sentence_3: 请早点儿告诉我，好让我提前做好准备。
pinyin_3: qǐng zǎo diǎn ér gào su wǒ， hǎo ràng wǒ tí qián zuò hǎo zhǔn bèi。
translation_3: Please let me know early so that I can prepare in advance.

name: 即使……，也……
sentence_1: 你即使干到明天早上，恐怕也干不完。
pinyin_1: nǐ jí shǐ gàn dào míng tiān zǎo shang， kǒng pà yě gàn bù wán。
translation_1: Even if you work through till tomorrow morning, you probably still won't be able to finish.
sentence_2: 即使工作再忙，也要常回家看看父母。
pinyin_2: jí shǐ gōng zuò zài máng， yě yào cháng huí jiā kàn kàn fù mǔ。
translation_2: Even if work is extremely busy, you should still go home often to see your parents.
sentence_3: 即使天气很冷，他也坚持每天跑步。
pinyin_3: jí shǐ tiān qì hěn lěng， tā yě jiān chí měi tiān pǎo bù。
translation_3: Even if the weather is very cold, he still insists on running every day.

name: 就是……，也……
sentence_1: 我今天晚上就是不睡觉，也必须解决这个问题。
pinyin_1: wǒ jīn tiān wǎn shang jiù shì bụ́ shuì jiào， yě bì xū jiě jué zhè ge wèn tí。
translation_1: Even if I don't sleep tonight, I must resolve this problem.
sentence_2: 你就是不同意，我也不会改变自己的决定。
pinyin_2: nǐ jiù shì bù tóng yì， wǒ yě bụ́ huì gǎi biàn zì jǐ de jué dìng。
translation_2: Even if you don't agree, I will not change my decision.
sentence_3: 就是路再远，他也要去见老师。
pinyin_3: jiù shì lù zài yuǎn， tā yě yào qù jiàn lǎo shī。
translation_3: Even if the road is very long, he still wants to go see his teacher.

name: 无标记
pinyin_1: nǐ zháo jí xiān zǒu ba。
translation_1: If you're in a hurry, go ahead and leave first.
pinyin_2: zhàn de gāo kàn de yuǎn。
translation_2: The higher you stand, the further you can see.
pinyin_3: tā tóng yì wǒ bù tóng yì。
translation_3: He agrees; I don't.

name: 不……也……
sentence_1: 今晚我不睡觉也要把作业写完。
pinyin_1: jīn wǎn wǒ bụ́ shuì jiào yě yào bǎ zuò yè xiě wán。
translation_1: Even if I don't sleep tonight, I'm going to finish my homework.
pinyin_2: nǐ bù xǐ huan zuò yě děi zuò。
translation_2: Even if you don't like doing it, you still have to do it.
sentence_3: 他不吃饭也要先把这封信写完。
pinyin_3: tā bù chī fàn yě yào xiān bǎ zhè fēng xìn xiě wán。
translation_3: Even without eating, he still wants to finish writing this letter first.

name: 概数表达法3：数词+来+量词
sentence_1: 教室里坐了五十来个学生。
pinyin_1: jiào shì lǐ zuò le wǔ shí lái gè xué sheng。
translation_1: Around fifty students are sitting in the classroom.
sentence_2: 桌子上放着一百来张纸。
pinyin_2: zhuō zi shàng fàng zhe yị̀ bǎi lái zhāng zhǐ。
translation_2: There are about a hundred sheets of paper on the table.
sentence_3: 这条大鱼估计有十来斤重。
pinyin_3: zhè tiáo dà yú gū jì yǒu shí lái jīn zhòng。
translation_3: This big fish is estimated to weigh around ten jin (about 5 kg).

name: 用”大约、左右、前后”表示概数
sentence_1: 客人大约下午两点到公司参观。
pinyin_1: kè rén dà yuē xià wǔ liǎng diǎn dào gōng sī cān guān。
translation_1: The guests will arrive at the company for their visit at around 2 p.m.
sentence_2: 我的中文老师四十岁左右。
pinyin_2: wǒ de zhōng wén lǎo shī sì shí suì zuǒ yòu。
translation_2: My Chinese teacher is around forty years old.
sentence_3: 春节前后，很多商场有打折活动。
pinyin_3: chūn jié qián hòu， hěn duō shāng chǎng yǒu dǎ zhé huó dòng。
translation_3: Around the time of the Spring Festival, many shopping malls hold sales.

name: 小数、分数、百分数、倍数的表示法
sentence_1: 这个数是零点五，也就是二分之一。
pinyin_1: zhè ge shù shì líng diǎn wǔ， yě jiù shì èr fēn zhī yī。
translation_1: This number is 0.5, which is one-half.
sentence_2: 这次考试，他的成绩是去年的两倍。
pinyin_2: zhè cì kǎo shì， tā de chéng jì shì qù nián de liǎng bèi。
translation_2: His score on this exam is twice what it was last year.
sentence_3: 这次有百分之八十的人通过了，其中三分之一是优秀。
pinyin_3: zhè cì yǒu bǎi fēn zhī bā shí de rén tōng guò le， qí zhōng sān fēn zhī yị́ shì yōu xiù。
translation_3: This time eighty percent of the people passed, of whom a third scored excellent.
